notes: Shapes use conservative placeholder widths where raw notes only provided length. Update dimensions as owners confirm details.

shapes.label: Loren Tacoma + trailer
shapes.notes: Toyota Tacoma 18 ft plus 16 ft trailer, modeled as combined 34 ft x 8 ft placeholder. Confirm width and whether truck/trailer can detach.

shapes.label: Ash Sprinter
shapes.notes: 20 ft Sprinter van. Width TBD; modeled as 8 ft until confirmed.

shapes.notes: Sprinter van and carport kept together as a 20 ft x 20 ft compound footprint. Confirm carport orientation and door-side clearance.

shapes.notes: 22 ft camper van. Width TBD; modeled as 8 ft until confirmed.

shapes.label: Jeb/Rissa solar zone
shapes.notes: 12 ft x 12 ft south-facing lower-shade footprint. Needs clear sun exposure for solar panels. Confirm whether this is vehicle, trailer, or standalone solar setup.

shapes.notes: 30 ft RV. Width, slide-outs, awning, door side, and access needs TBD; modeled as 30 ft x 10 ft placeholder.

shapes.label: Eyal trailer
shapes.notes: 12 ft trailer. Width, tow vehicle, detach status, and sleeping use TBD.

shapes.label: Team box truck
shapes.notes: 35 ft box truck. Width and loading-door access side TBD; consider edge placement and storage/kitchen access.

shapes.notes: 45 ft x 9 ft cargo trailer plus 6 ft stair/access allowance, modeled as 45 ft x 15 ft effective footprint. Confirm stair side and access geometry.
